# EU Business Wallet Regulation Proposal

## Article 12 Registration certificate
The qualified registration certificate shall identify the organisation that uses the business wallet.
Member States may define national registration procedures only where Union law leaves implementation discretion.

## Article 13 Access certificate
The access certificate shall identify the relying party service that is entitled to request wallet-mediated access.
Any national operational step remains subordinate to the Union rule and cannot replace the Union certificate model.

## Article 18 Evidence and traceability
Evidence used to support regulatory conclusions should stay tied to the governing document and provision.
